component_context.description: Punto de entrada de identidad, validación de credenciales y emisión de tokens JWT. Gestiona el flujo completo de autenticación incluyendo MFA y rotación de tokens.
component_context.architecture_role: Backend authentication service — stateless JWT-based identity provider

outputs.output: Access Token (JWT, 15 min expiry, signed RS256)
Refresh Token (opaque UUID, 7 d expiry, stored in Redis)

api_interactions.endpoint: Token rotation — invalidates old refresh token

external_dependencies.dependency: MongoDB via Beanie ODM — users collection (password hash, mfa_secret)
Redis — refresh token store with TTL

business_logic.rule: Passwords hashed with bcrypt (cost factor 12); plain-text never stored
MFA step required when user.mfa_enabled is true; temp token issued for MFA flow
Failed login attempts tracked in Redis; account soft-locked after 5 failures in 10 min
Refresh token rotation: each use issues a new refresh token and invalidates the old one

trust_boundaries.boundary: Client-supplied Bearer token → JWT signature validation (server-side only)
Refresh token → Redis TTL check (server-side, not client-visible)

access_control.rule: No admin-only endpoints in this module
